Describe the visual sequence from the intro graphics to the introduction of the presenter.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white snowflake graphics appear on a gold background; at 2s, the text 'How to Decorate a Christmas Tree' fades into view; at 6s, a close-up shows a glass bauble containing a small bird figurine; at 7s, a woman with brown hair stands near a decorated tree.

question: Describe the actions taken during the initial tree assembly phase shown in the later segment.
canonical_answer: At 16s, a person with short blonde hair begins fluffing the branches of an artificial Christmas tree; at 17s, a close-up shot shows a hand manipulating the green needles of the tree; at 18s, a cardboard box filled with red and silver baubles sits open on the floor near the tree base.
